programs.name: El Salvador
programs.bitcoin_integration: Bitcoin is legal tender (voluntary acceptance after 2025 reforms). Strong government support for Bitcoin ecosystem, Lightning network adoption, and crypto businesses. No capital gains tax on Bitcoin in many cases. Excellent for Bitcoin-native identity experiments and residency.

finance.tax_benefits: Favorable crypto tax treatment; Bitcoin legal tender status provides strong sovereign signal. Potential residency pathways tied to economic contribution.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Direct Bitcoin payments accepted in many places. Government Bitcoin reserve and infrastructure. Ideal for MotoPass Bitcoin passport pilots.

programs.details: First country to make Bitcoin legal tender. Updated rules in 2025 for flexibility while remaining highly pro-Bitcoin. Strong fit for MotoPass sovereign passport and identity experiments.

pathways.label: Economic contribution residency
pathways.notes: Voluntary Bitcoin legal tender; pathways tied to economic activity and investment.

pathways.label: Bitcoin business establishment
pathways.notes: Strong fit for Lightning-native operators and crypto founders.

critical_tests.notes: Legal tender status; regional mobility via CA-4 for citizens.

legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Generally permitted with standard restrictions.
legal_compliance.recent_changes: 2025 reforms shifted to voluntary merchant acceptance while retaining pro-Bitcoin posture.

common_questions: Is Bitcoin still legal tender?
What are capital gains rules for BTC?
red_flags: Verify current reform details before structuring
optimization_tips: Use Lightning-first business footprint in San Salvador
paige_fields.escalate_when: Large corporate relocation or mining operations

programs.name: Central African Republic
programs.bitcoin_integration: Bitcoin legal tender since 2022. Focus on financial inclusion via Bitcoin. Growing interest in crypto infrastructure.

finance.tax_benefits: Bitcoin legal tender framework supports digital asset activity. Tax incentives for foreign investment in some cases.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Legal tender status enables direct Bitcoin use. Good testbed for MotoPass in emerging markets.

programs.details: Second country to adopt Bitcoin as legal tender. Focus on inclusion and sovereignty. Relevant for MotoPass global passport vision.

pathways.label: Primary pathway (research pending)
pathways.notes: Template from Central African Republic finance fields — deepen to Uruguay standard.

critical_tests.notes: Critical tests pending official research pass.

legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Verify with counsel before committing capital.

common_questions: What is the minimum investment for Central African Republic?
Is Bitcoin accepted for fees?
red_flags: Template depth — verify all figures before acting
optimization_tips: Cross-check with /btcmap merchant density for lifestyle fit
paige_fields.escalate_when: Any commitment above typical investment threshold

programs.name: Uruguay
programs.bitcoin_integration: Growing crypto-friendly environment. Stable democracy with interest in digital assets and fintech. Potential for Bitcoin residency incentives.

finance.tax_benefits: Territorial tax system attractive for high-net-worth. Crypto gains often favorably treated. Strong residency pathway.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Stable jurisdiction for Bitcoin holders. Good base for MotoPass Latin America hub.

programs.details: Popular for residency. High quality of life, stable politics, and increasing openness to crypto and remote workers. Excellent candidate for MotoPass Bitcoin residency program.

pathways.label: Real estate investment
pathways.notes: Beachfront and rural ownership widely permitted for foreigners.

pathways.label: Rentista / income proof
pathways.notes: ~$1,500/month sustained income — lower capital lock-up than RE route.

pathways.label: Bank deposit / bonds
pathways.notes: Passive investment equivalent; useful for BTC→fiat structuring.

critical_tests.notes: Mercosur mobility (~10 countries); visa-free ~170 after naturalization.

legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Foreigners may own beachfront and rural land with few restrictions.
legal_compliance.recent_changes: 2025–2026 digital nomad and investor pathways streamlined.

common_questions: Can I keep foreign crypto gains tax-free?
How fast is Mercosur access?
Is beachfront ownership allowed?
red_flags: Income proof must be sustainable; apostille delays
optimization_tips: RE investment for faster approval; territorial tax for BTC gains
paige_fields.escalate_when: Complex tax structuring or $500k+ investments

programs.name: Bolivia
programs.bitcoin_integration: Emerging interest in crypto. Regulatory environment evolving. Potential for Bitcoin-friendly policies in coming years.

finance.tax_benefits: Research needed on crypto tax treatment and investment incentives.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Monitor for policy shifts. Potential future MotoPass candidate in Andes region.

programs.details: User to fill detailed research, current finance numbers, Bitcoin friendliness, and status update.

pathways.label: Investor / company route
pathways.notes: Business establishment or capital investment — no pure CBI passport-for-donation program.

pathways.label: Low solvency / fixed deposit
pathways.notes: Budget stacking option via solvency proof — verify current SUPREME DECREE thresholds with counsel.

critical_tests.notes: Weaker passport mobility vs Uruguay; research dual nationality policy before committing.

legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Restrictions in border/security zones; urban RE often viable — legal review required.
legal_compliance.recent_changes: Crypto regulation evolving; monitor official gazette.

common_questions: Is there a golden passport program?
Can foreigners buy land?
What is the solvency route minimum?
red_flags: No pure CBI
INRA land restrictions near borders
Bitcoin policy still forming
optimization_tips: Position as value/distressed stack leg, not primary hub
paige_fields.escalate_when: Land purchase near restricted zones or corporate restructuring

programs.name: St. Kitts and Nevis
programs.bitcoin_integration: One of the oldest and most respected CBI programs. Crypto-friendly in practice for high-net-worth applicants. Accepts digital asset investments in some cases.

finance.tax_benefits: No personal income, capital gains, or inheritance tax. Very attractive for Bitcoin holders.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Program accepts real estate or donation; some flexibility for crypto-sourced funds. Strong passport mobility.

programs.details: Premium Caribbean CBI. Excellent passport strength and tax neutrality. Top-tier for MotoPass Bitcoin sovereign citizens.

pathways.label: Sustainable Growth Fund (SGF) donation
pathways.notes: Non-refundable contribution to govt fund — fastest CBI route; family add-ons increase total cost.

pathways.label: Approved real estate investment
pathways.notes: Government-approved development; hold period typically 5–7 years — may be resalable after lock-up.

pathways.label: Public Good Project Option (PGPO)
pathways.notes: Approved public-good projects — verify current PGPO availability and project list with licensed agent.

critical_tests.notes: Premium Caribbean passport (~150+ visa-free); no personal income, capital gains, or inheritance tax. No residency requirement post-approval.

primary_laws: St. Kitts and Nevis Citizenship by Investment Unit regulations
legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Foreigners may purchase approved CBI real estate and other property with standard conveyancing.
legal_compliance.recent_changes: SGF remains primary donation route; pricing and due diligence standards tightened industry-wide post-2024.

common_questions: SGF vs real estate — which is better?
Can I use Bitcoin to fund the donation?
Is there a residency requirement?
red_flags: Use only CIU-licensed agents
Source-of-funds scrutiny high for crypto wealth
Real estate route has hold-period lock-up
optimization_tips: SGF for speed and simplicity; RE if you want an asset + passport combo
paige_fields.escalate_when: Crypto source-of-funds documentation or family application >4 dependents

programs.name: Antigua and Barbuda
programs.bitcoin_integration: Well-regarded CBI program. Increasing openness to digital assets and fintech investors.

finance.tax_benefits: No capital gains or inheritance tax. Territorial elements attractive.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Good for Bitcoin-funded applications. Strong passport for travel.

programs.details: Solid Caribbean option with good reputation and Bitcoin holder friendliness.

pathways.label: National Development Fund (NDF) donation
pathways.notes: Single applicant minimum; govt processing fees additional — competitive Caribbean CBI pricing.

pathways.label: Approved real estate
pathways.notes: Government-approved project; 5-year hold typical. UWI fund option also available at similar threshold.

pathways.label: Business investment
pathways.notes: Direct business investment route — higher capital, less common than NDF; verify current minimum with CBI unit.

critical_tests.notes: Strong passport mobility; 5-day physical presence in first 5 years required to maintain citizenship. No capital gains tax.

primary_laws: Antigua and Barbuda Citizenship by Investment Unit Regulations
legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Foreigners may own property; CBI requires approved development purchase.
legal_compliance.recent_changes: NDF thresholds stable; industry-wide enhanced due diligence post-2024 Caribbean CBI summit commitments.

common_questions: What is the 5-day residency rule?
NDF vs real estate cost comparison?
Can Bitcoin wealth fund the application?
red_flags: 5-day visit requirement over 5 years — track compliance
Processing fees add ~$30k+ on top of donation
Business route rarely used — confirm viability
optimization_tips: NDF for cost efficiency; plan 5-day visits as Caribbean holidays
paige_fields.escalate_when: Family applications or complex crypto wealth tracing

programs.name: Dominica
programs.bitcoin_integration: Popular, cost-effective CBI. Accepts crypto in practice for qualified applicants.

finance.tax_benefits: No income or capital gains tax on foreign income for many applicants.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Affordable entry point with solid passport. Good MotoPass test case.

programs.details: One of the more accessible premium CBI programs. Strong value for Bitcoiners.

pathways.label: Economic Diversification Fund (EDF) donation
pathways.notes: Most affordable premium CBI donation route; single applicant baseline — family tiers increase cost.

pathways.label: Approved real estate
pathways.notes: Government-approved development with hold period; verify current approved project list.

pathways.label: Alternative investment option
pathways.notes: Govt-approved alternative projects — less common than EDF; confirm availability with authorized agent.

critical_tests.notes: Value CBI play — solid passport at lower price point. No residency requirement; no income/capital gains tax on foreign income for non-residents.

legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Foreigners may purchase approved CBI real estate; standard restrictions on non-approved land.
legal_compliance.recent_changes: EDF remains primary route; due diligence standards aligned with regional CBI reforms.

common_questions: Is Dominica the best value CBI?
How does passport strength compare to St. Kitts?
Can I fund with crypto?
red_flags: Passport slightly weaker than premium tier
Only use CBIU-authorized agents
Post-approval name change restrictions apply
optimization_tips: EDF for budget-conscious stackers needing a second passport fast
paige_fields.escalate_when: Comparing Dominica vs Grenada for E-2 treaty access (Grenada only)

programs.name: UAE (Dubai / Abu Dhabi)
programs.bitcoin_integration: Extremely crypto-friendly free zones (VARA in Dubai). Zero personal income tax and capital gains on crypto. Major Bitcoin and Web3 hub. Lightning and on-chain activity welcomed.

finance.tax_benefits: 0% personal income tax, 0% capital gains on crypto. Golden Visa pathways via investment or business setup.
finance.bitcoin_specific: World-class for Bitcoin businesses and holders. VARA regulation provides clarity. Perfect MotoPass flagship jurisdiction.

programs.details: Top global crypto hub. Ideal base for MotoPass operations, Bitcoin company incorporation, and high-end residency.

pathways.label: Golden Visa (10-year)
pathways.notes: Property or investment threshold in AED equivalent; VARA clarity for crypto businesses.

pathways.label: Free zone company + residency
pathways.notes: Popular for Bitcoin/Web3 operators; zero personal income tax in many structures.

critical_tests.notes: UAE does not offer citizenship by investment; residency + tax efficiency is the play.

primary_laws: Federal Decree-Law on Entry and Residence
legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Freehold zones available for foreigners in designated areas.
legal_compliance.recent_changes: VARA framework strengthens crypto business licensing.

common_questions: Can I run a Bitcoin business from Dubai?
What is the golden visa property threshold?
Are crypto gains taxed?
red_flags: No CBI path to passport
Free zone vs mainland entity choice matters
optimization_tips: VARA-licensed structure for crypto treasury; Lightning-friendly free zones
paige_fields.escalate_when: VARA licensing or $1M+ property golden visa

programs.name: Switzerland
programs.bitcoin_integration: Crypto Valley (Zug) is legendary. Clear regulation, strong rule of law, excellent banking for crypto. Many Bitcoin companies headquartered here. Residency possible via investment or business.

finance.tax_benefits: Favorable lump-sum taxation in some cantons for high-net-worth. Crypto treated as asset class with clarity.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Best-in-class infrastructure for Bitcoin companies and individuals. On-chain friendly. Top MotoPass European anchor.

programs.details: Gold standard for crypto jurisdiction. High quality of life and stability. Excellent for serious Bitcoin sovereigns.

pathways.label: Lump-sum taxation (negotiated)
pathways.notes: Canton-negotiated annual tax for wealthy residents — popular HNW pathway.

pathways.label: Company + director residency
pathways.notes: Crypto Valley (Zug) pathway for Bitcoin businesses and founders.

critical_tests.notes: Strong rule of law; naturalization is canton-specific and slow vs CBI jurisdictions.

primary_laws: Federal Act on Foreign Nationals and Integration
legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Permitted with cantonal restrictions for non-EU/EFTA in some cases.
legal_compliance.recent_changes: Crypto Valley continues as Bitcoin business hub; FINMA clarity for VASPs.

common_questions: Which canton for lump-sum tax?
Can I hold BTC in a Swiss entity?
Crypto Valley vs Zurich for founders?
red_flags: Citizenship takes years — plan for residency not passport
Canton selection drives tax outcome
optimization_tips: Zug for Bitcoin treasury companies; lump-sum in low-tax cantons
paige_fields.escalate_when: Canton negotiation or FINMA-regulated activity

programs.name: Singapore
programs.bitcoin_integration: Clear, balanced regulation (MAS). Strong fintech and crypto scene. Excellent infrastructure. Residency via investment or Global Investor Programme.

finance.tax_benefits: No capital gains tax. Territorial tax system. Very attractive for Bitcoin holders and funds.
finance.bitcoin_specific: World-class for Bitcoin trading, custody, and business. Strict but predictable. Strong MotoPass Asia base.

programs.details: Premier Asian hub. High trust, excellent connectivity, strong rule of law. Ideal for MotoPass regional headquarters.

pathways.label: Global Investor Programme (GIP)
pathways.notes: S$2.5M+ in approved business, fund, or family office — premier HNW residency route; verify current MAS-approved categories.

pathways.label: EntrePass / EP company director
pathways.notes: Incorporate Singapore entity with meaningful local activity; lower capital than GIP but requires operational substance.

pathways.label: Single Family Office (SFO)
pathways.notes: MAS-licensed SFO pathway for crypto treasury families — strict AML but no capital gains tax on personal holdings.

critical_tests.notes: PR achievable via GIP; citizenship rare and generally requires renouncing prior nationality. No capital gains tax — major BTC advantage.

legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Foreigners may purchase private residential with ABSD surcharge (15–60% depending on profile); landed restricted.
legal_compliance.recent_changes: MAS continues tightening VASP licensing; GIP fund categories updated periodically — confirm eligible vehicles.

common_questions: Can I run a Bitcoin fund from Singapore?
What is the GIP minimum today?
Is PR the realistic end-state vs passport?
red_flags: Citizenship effectively unavailable for most
MAS licensing required for custodial/trading activity
ABSD adds cost to property route
optimization_tips: Structure for PR + tax efficiency, not passport; use VCC for fund vehicles
paige_fields.escalate_when: MAS licensing, GIP fund selection, or $5M+ family office structuring

programs.name: Portugal
programs.bitcoin_integration: Was very crypto-friendly (NHR regime). Recent changes to tax rules for crypto. Still attractive but monitor updates. Golden Visa evolving.

finance.tax_benefits: Changes in 2023-2025 reduced some benefits. Still territorial elements and quality of life high.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Monitor closely. Previously excellent; now more neutral. Good lifestyle option if rules stabilize.

programs.details: Lifestyle + residency strong, but tax/crypto policy has shifted. Requires fresh research for MotoPass.

pathways.label: Golden Visa (investment fund route)
pathways.notes: Fund route remains common post-housing reform; verify current eligible categories.

pathways.label: D7 passive income
pathways.notes: Lower capital pathway for remote income / pensioners — popular with Bitcoiners.

critical_tests.notes: EU Schengen access; citizenship after 5 years with Portuguese language requirement.

legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Permitted; golden visa real estate route restricted/reformed — verify current rules.
legal_compliance.recent_changes: Housing-route golden visa largely closed; funds and business routes remain.

common_questions: Is the housing golden visa still available?
How does NHR tax status interact with BTC?
Minimum stay for citizenship?
red_flags: Policy shifted 2023–2024 — confirm eligible investment category
NHR regime changes
optimization_tips: D7 for lower capital; fund route for EU stackers
paige_fields.escalate_when: NHR + crypto treasury structuring

programs.name: Malta
programs.bitcoin_integration: Crypto-friendly EU member with clear licensing (MFSA). Good for Bitcoin businesses seeking EU passporting. Residency options available.

finance.tax_benefits: Favorable corporate tax regime. Crypto licensing clarity.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Strong for regulated Bitcoin activity in EU. Good MotoPass EU bridge.

programs.details: Solid EU option with crypto regulation maturity. Useful for MotoPass compliance and passport mobility.

pathways.label: Malta Permanent Residence Programme (MPRP)
pathways.notes: Govt contribution + property rental/purchase — EU Schengen mobility without minimum stay; popular stacker route.

pathways.label: Nomad Residence Permit (NRP)
pathways.notes: ~€42k annual remote income proof — lower capital, 1-year renewable; verify current income thresholds.

pathways.label: VFA business + director residency
pathways.notes: MFSA crypto licensing pathway for EU passporting — higher compliance overhead but strong for regulated Bitcoin businesses.

critical_tests.notes: EU member; citizenship after 5+ years residence with language/integration requirements — not a fast CBI.

legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Foreigners may acquire property; MPRP requires qualifying lease or purchase.
legal_compliance.recent_changes: Individual Investor Programme (IIP) closed; MPRP remains active. MFSA VFA framework mature but compliance-heavy.

common_questions: Is MPRP still the main EU route?
Can I hold BTC without triggering Maltese tax?
How does MFSA licensing work for exchanges?
red_flags: IIP closed — do not confuse with MPRP
Remittance basis tax requires careful structuring
Citizenship is slow vs Caribbean CBI
optimization_tips: MPRP for Schengen access with minimal stay; remittance basis for foreign-sourced BTC gains
paige_fields.escalate_when: MFSA licensing application or citizenship naturalization planning

programs.name: Panama
programs.bitcoin_integration: Territorial tax system. Crypto generally treated favorably. Popular with Bitcoiners and digital nomads. Friendly residency programs.

finance.tax_benefits: Territorial taxation — foreign income often not taxed. Very attractive for Bitcoin holders.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Popular Bitcoin jurisdiction in practice. Good cost-to-benefit for MotoPass LatAm strategy.

programs.details: Strong territorial tax + crypto friendly in practice. Excellent value residency option.

pathways.label: Friendly Nations Visa
pathways.notes: Economic ties + local bank deposit (~$5k) — fastest budget route for citizens of ~50 listed countries; verify list includes your nationality.

pathways.label: Qualified Investor Visa
pathways.notes: Real estate or fixed-term deposit at qualifying threshold — permanent residency track; thresholds reformed in 2021–2022.

pathways.label: Pensionado / fixed income
pathways.notes: Minimum ~$1,000/month lifetime pension — popular retiree route; not ideal for active Bitcoin entrepreneurs but low cost.

critical_tests.notes: Territorial tax — foreign-source income (including BTC gains realized abroad) often untaxed locally; citizenship after 5 years with Spanish proficiency.

legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Foreigners may own real estate freely; no general restrictions on urban property.
legal_compliance.recent_changes: 2021 decree raised qualified investor thresholds; Friendly Nations remains popular for low-capital entrants.

common_questions: Does Panama tax my foreign Bitcoin gains?
Which visa for a $100k budget?
Can I get citizenship from residency?
red_flags: Banking due diligence strict for crypto-sourced funds
Qualified investor thresholds changed — confirm current amounts
Friendly Nations country list is limited
optimization_tips: Territorial tax + Friendly Nations for budget stackers; RE route for permanent residency
paige_fields.escalate_when: Crypto fund source documentation for banking or $300k+ qualified investor structuring

programs.name: Georgia
programs.bitcoin_integration: Very crypto-friendly policies in recent years. Low taxes, fast residency, growing Bitcoin scene. Attractive for digital asset holders.

finance.tax_benefits: Low flat tax, territorial elements, crypto often favorably treated.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Fast, low-cost, crypto-positive. Strong emerging MotoPass candidate for Europe/Asia corridor.

programs.details: Rising star for Bitcoiners seeking fast, affordable, friendly jurisdiction. High potential.

pathways.label: Work residence via company registration
pathways.notes: Register Georgian LLC with modest capital; fast processing (weeks). Popular emerging-market hub for crypto operators.

pathways.label: Real estate ownership residency
pathways.notes: Property investment pathway — verify current minimum thresholds with counsel; Tbilisi market accessible.

pathways.label: Remotely from Georgia
pathways.notes: Remote worker permit with proof of ~$2k/month foreign income — very low capital entry; 1-year renewable.

critical_tests.notes: Individual crypto trading taxed at 0% in practice for personal holders; corporate rate 15%. Fast, affordable — weaker passport than EU/Caribbean.

primary_laws: Law on Legal Status of Foreigners
Virtual Asset Service Providers draft framework
legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Foreigners may freely purchase land and apartments except agricultural land (restrictions apply).
legal_compliance.recent_changes: VASP licensing framework developing; personal crypto gains remain favorable. Remote work permit launched 2021.

common_questions: Is personal Bitcoin trading really 0% tax?
How fast is the company route?
Is the passport worth naturalizing for?
red_flags: VASP rules evolving — business activity may need licensing soon
Banking can be uneven for crypto deposits
Citizenship takes 10 years
optimization_tips: Company + remote work combo for lowest cost; Tbilisi as BTC operational base
paige_fields.escalate_when: VASP-regulated business activity or large-scale mining operations

programs.name: Paraguay
programs.bitcoin_integration: Low taxes, crypto interest growing. Territorial tax system attractive. Bitcoin mining and adoption increasing.

finance.tax_benefits: Low tax jurisdiction. Potential for crypto incentives.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Watch for Bitcoin mining and adoption growth. Good cost-effective LatAm option.

programs.details: Emerging low-tax friendly jurisdiction. Add detailed finance and Bitcoin notes from latest research.

pathways.label: SUACE investor residency
pathways.notes: Simplified registry for foreign investors — business plan + capital commitment; verify current SUACE minimums with local counsel.

pathways.label: Real estate investment residency
pathways.notes: Property acquisition pathway — popular in Asunción and Encarnación; confirm current immigration thresholds.

pathways.label: Rentista / passive income proof
pathways.notes: Proof of ~$1,200/month passive income — lower capital route; suitable for remote Bitcoin income earners.

critical_tests.notes: Territorial tax system — foreign-source income often untaxed. Growing Bitcoin mining scene; weaker passport vs Uruguay but lower cost.

legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Foreigners may own property; rural/agricultural land may have additional registration requirements.
legal_compliance.recent_changes: 2022 migration law modernized residency categories; Bitcoin mining interest growing but regulatory framework still forming.

common_questions: Is Paraguay territorial tax reliable for BTC?
SUACE vs rentista for my budget?
How fast is permanent residency?
red_flags: Immigration bureaucracy can be slow and inconsistent
Bitcoin mining regulations still evolving
Banking for crypto natives uneven
optimization_tips: Rentista for low-capital remote earners; SUACE for business operators and miners
paige_fields.escalate_when: Mining operation licensing or citizenship naturalization within 3-year window

programs.name: Costa Rica
programs.bitcoin_integration: Territorial tax, growing crypto adoption, popular with nomads.

finance.tax_benefits: Territorial elements
finance.bitcoin_specific: Nomad-friendly, Lightning cafes in San José

programs.details: Stable democracy, territorial tax appeal, rising Bitcoin community.

pathways.label: Digital nomad visa (Law 9996)
pathways.notes: ~$3,000/month foreign income proof (~$4,000 with dependents); 1-year renewable remote-work permit — popular Bitcoin nomad route.

pathways.label: Rentista / fixed income
pathways.notes: ~$2,500/month guaranteed for 2+ years from investments, dividends, or rentals — apostilled income proof required.

pathways.label: Inversionista (investor)
pathways.notes: $150k+ in qualifying business, securities, or real estate — permanent residency track; verify approved project categories.

critical_tests.notes: Territorial tax on Costa Rica–source income only; CA-4 regional mobility for citizens. Dual nationality rules vary by origin — confirm before naturalization.

primary_laws: Ley General de Migración y Extranjería
Código de Normas y Procedimientos Tributarios (territorial principle)
legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Foreigners may own urban and most rural property; beachfront concessions require special permits in maritime zone.
legal_compliance.recent_changes: 2021 digital nomad law formalized remote work; 2024–2025 immigration processing times vary by consulate.

common_questions: Does Costa Rica tax my foreign Bitcoin gains?
Digital nomad vs rentista for $50k budget?
How long to citizenship from residency?
red_flags: Income proofs must be apostilled — plan 2–3 month lead time
Banking due diligence strict for crypto-sourced deposits
Maritime-zone property requires concession, not fee simple
optimization_tips: Digital nomad visa for lowest-capital remote earners; territorial tax for foreign BTC realized abroad
Stack with Panama Friendly Nations for Central America mobility
paige_fields.escalate_when: Inversionista $150k+ deployment or maritime-zone property structuring

programs.name: Hong Kong
programs.bitcoin_integration: Major Asian finance hub, clear SFC crypto licensing framework.

finance.tax_benefits: Low tax territory
finance.bitcoin_specific: Licensed exchanges, institutional BTC custody

programs.details: Gateway to Asia capital markets with maturing crypto regulation.

pathways.label: Capital Investment Entrant Scheme (CIES)
pathways.notes: HK$30M+ in permitted assets (re-launched 2024) — premier HNW route to 2-year visa, extendable to 7-year PR track.

pathways.label: Top Talent Pass Scheme
pathways.notes: High-income professionals (HK$2.5M+ annual income in prior year) or top-university graduates — 2-year open work visa, no employer sponsor.

pathways.label: Investment as Entrepreneurs / GEP
pathways.notes: Incorporate HK entity with substantive local operations and job creation — lower profile than CIES but requires business substance.

critical_tests.notes: No capital gains tax — major BTC advantage. PR realistic; separate HK citizenship not available — PRC nationality pathway only. Post-2020 legal environment evolving.

primary_laws: SFC Virtual Asset Trading Platform licensing framework
legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Foreigners may purchase private residential; Buyer's Stamp Duty and Additional BSD surcharges apply (up to 30%+ for non-permanent residents).
legal_compliance.recent_changes: CIES reinstated March 2024 at HK$30M threshold; SFC VATP licensing regime maturing for custodial exchanges.

common_questions: Can I run a Bitcoin fund from Hong Kong?
What is the CIES minimum today?
Is 7-year PR the realistic end-state?
red_flags: CIES threshold is HK$30M — confirm permitted asset categories
SFC licensing required for custodial/trading activity
BSD surcharges add significant property cost for non-PR holders
optimization_tips: Structure for PR + zero CGT, not passport; TTPS for employed crypto professionals
Pair with Singapore GIP only if capital exceeds single-jurisdiction needs
paige_fields.escalate_when: SFC VATP licensing, CIES asset selection, or $5M+ family office structuring

programs.name: Thailand
programs.bitcoin_integration: Elite visa and LTR programs, growing crypto scene in Bangkok.

finance.tax_benefits: Territorial for foreign income
finance.bitcoin_specific: LTR visa popular with Bitcoiners

programs.details: Lifestyle + residency combo with improving crypto clarity.

pathways.label: Long-Term Resident (LTR) visa
pathways.notes: $80k/year income or $1M assets + qualifying investment — 10-year renewable permit with work authorization; verify category (wealthy citizen, pensioner, remote worker, skilled pro).

pathways.label: Thailand Elite residence
pathways.notes: Membership packages from ~$15k (5 years) to ~$60k (20 years) — lifestyle residency without income proof; popular stacker shortcut.

pathways.label: Non-Immigrant B / BOI company
pathways.notes: Thai company with work permit via BOI-promoted activity — operational substance required; verify current capital and Thai-shareholding rules.

critical_tests.notes: 2024+ territorial tax reforms may tax foreign income remitted to Thailand — structure carefully. Citizenship rare for foreigners; PR after 3 consecutive years on qualifying visas.

legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Foreigners may own condominiums up to 49% of building units; land ownership prohibited — leasehold or Thai-company structures common.
legal_compliance.recent_changes: LTR launched 2022; 2024 Revenue Department guidance on foreign-sourced income remittance created tax uncertainty for nomads.

common_questions: Does Thailand tax Bitcoin I bring into the country?
LTR vs Elite for a remote Bitcoin earner?
Can foreigners own land?
red_flags: 2024 remittance-based taxation — keep foreign gains offshore until rules clarified
Land ownership restricted — condo 49% quota or leasehold only
Work permit required for any local employment activity
optimization_tips: Elite for lifestyle-only; LTR if you need legal work authorization
Avoid remitting crypto gains to Thai accounts until tax counsel confirms treatment
paige_fields.escalate_when: LTR category selection, BOI company structuring, or large condo portfolio acquisition

programs.name: Mexico
programs.bitcoin_integration: Temporary and permanent residency paths, active Bitcoin community.

finance.tax_benefits: Territorial for non-Mexico income
finance.bitcoin_specific: Bitcoin circular economies in CDMX and beach towns

programs.details: Accessible North American residency with territorial tax benefits.

pathways.label: Temporary resident (economic solvency)
pathways.notes: Bank balances or income proof (~$2,600/month or ~$43k balance) — 1–4 year renewable; most accessible North American route.

pathways.label: Investor visa (capital investment)
pathways.notes: Mexican business or property investment at qualifying threshold — path to permanent residency; verify current MXN equivalent.

pathways.label: Permanent resident (after 4 years temporary)
pathways.notes: Upgrade from temporary status after 4 consecutive years — no new capital required if compliance maintained.

critical_tests.notes: Territorial tax for non-Mexico income in practice for many structures; active Bitcoin community in CDMX, Tulum, Puerto Vallarta. Citizenship after 5 years.

primary_laws: Reglamento de la Ley de Migración
legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Foreigners may own property except in restricted coastal/border zones (fideicomiso required within ~50km of coast).
legal_compliance.recent_changes: 2024–2025 digital nomad interest surged; INM processing times vary by consulate. Fintech law provides crypto framework but taxation case-by-case.

common_questions: Does Mexico tax my foreign Bitcoin gains?
Temporary vs investor visa for $50k budget?
Can I use fideicomiso for beach property?
red_flags: Consulate requirements vary significantly
Coastal property needs fideicomiso structure
Cartel/security considerations in some regions — location matters
optimization_tips: Temporary resident for fast North American base; territorial tax for foreign BTC income
paige_fields.escalate_when: Fideicomiso structuring, investor visa capital deployment, or citizenship naturalization

programs.name: Cyprus
programs.bitcoin_integration: EU member, non-dom regime, growing fintech sector.

finance.tax_benefits: Non-dom 17 years
finance.bitcoin_specific: EU passport path, crypto service providers licensed

programs.details: EU access with non-dom tax optimization for HNW.

pathways.label: Permanent residency (Regulation 6.2)
pathways.notes: €300k+ in new residential property + €30k bank deposit + clean record — fast EU permanent residency (~2 months); no minimum stay requirement.

pathways.label: Digital nomad visa
pathways.notes: ~€3,500/month net remote income proof — 1-year renewable; lower capital than 6.2 route, Schengen travel access.

pathways.label: Non-dom tax residency
pathways.notes: 17-year non-domicile regime exempts foreign dividends and capital gains — pair with 6.2 PR or employment route; requires substance and day-count planning.

critical_tests.notes: EU member; citizenship after 7 years (or 5 with Greek proficiency). Golden passport (CBI) scheme closed 2020 — do not confuse with 6.2 PR.

legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Foreigners may purchase property; 6.2 route requires new-build residential at qualifying threshold. No general land restrictions for EU-route investors.
legal_compliance.recent_changes: Golden passport programme terminated 2020 after EU pressure; 6.2 fast-track PR remains active. Schengen accession negotiations ongoing.

common_questions: Is the Cyprus golden passport still available?
Can non-dom protect my foreign BTC gains?
6.2 vs digital nomad for €300k budget?
red_flags: Golden passport closed — agents still marketing it illegally
6.2 requires new-build residential, not resale in all cases
Non-dom requires careful day-count and remittance planning
optimization_tips: 6.2 PR for zero-stay EU base; non-dom for 17-year foreign-gains shield
Pair with Malta MPRP only if you need two Mediterranean EU anchors
paige_fields.escalate_when: 6.2 property selection, non-dom election, or CySEC-licensed business setup

pathways.notes: Government-approved project with hold period; verify current approved developments.

critical_tests.notes: Only Caribbean CBI with US E-2 treaty access — major differentiator for US market entry. No residency requirement post-approval.

programs.name: Estonia
programs.bitcoin_integration: Estonia offers residency or citizenship pathways with growing crypto-friendly policy. Bitcoin holders evaluate tax treatment, processing time, and stacking synergy with other jurisdictions.

finance.tax_benefits: Favorable territorial or low-rate treatment for foreign income in many structures.
finance.bitcoin_specific: Active Bitcoin community; Lightning adoption in fintech corridors.

programs.details: Flagship-depth research entry for Estonia. Part of MotoPass 50-jurisdiction tracker — compare finance, sovereignty score, and stacking synergy with portfolio tools.

pathways.label: Digital nomad visa
pathways.notes: ~€3,504/month gross remote income proof — 1-year permit for location-independent workers; does not grant tax residency automatically.

pathways.label: Startup visa / founder residence
pathways.notes: Estonian startup endorsed by Startup Committee — equity-based founder route with modest capital; popular for Lightning/fintech builders.

pathways.label: e-Residency + OÜ company
pathways.notes: Digital identity for EU company formation — not physical residency; pair with nomad or employment visa for Tallinn base. €300 state fee + compliance costs.

critical_tests.notes: EU/Schengen access via residence permit. e-Residency ≠ residency. Crypto licensing tightened 2020–2022 — VASP rules apply to custodial businesses. Citizenship after 8 years with Estonian language.

primary_laws: Money Laundering and Terrorist Financing Prevention Act (VASP rules)
legal_compliance.property_foreign_ownership: Foreigners may freely purchase apartments and land with no general restrictions; same rights as Estonian citizens for urban property.
legal_compliance.recent_changes: 2020–2022 FIU tightened crypto licensing — many VASPs exited. Digital nomad visa launched 2020; startup visa remains active for endorsed founders.

common_questions: Does e-Residency give me EU residency?
Can I run a Bitcoin company from Estonia?
Digital nomad vs startup visa for founders?
red_flags: e-Residency is NOT a visa — cannot live in Estonia on it alone
VASP licensing required for custodial/exchange activity
Dual citizenship not permitted except in limited birth cases
optimization_tips: Startup visa for founders; nomad visa for remote earners
OÜ structure for EU invoicing; keep custodial activity licensed or offshore
paige_fields.escalate_when: FIU VASP licensing application, startup committee endorsement, or citizenship naturalization planning
